speaking_task.description: Read the dialogue aloud 3 times to build mouth muscle memory.
speaking_task.instructions: Read the dialogue slowly at first. Focus on the liaison in 'comment_allez' and the nasal sounds in 'bonjour' and 'bien'. Repeat 3 times.

speaking_task.description: Read the dialogue aloud 3 times. Focus on silent final consonants.
speaking_task.instructions: Pay attention to the silent final consonants in 'deux' and 'désirez'. Practice the liaison in 'deux_expressos'.

speaking_task.description: Read the dialogue aloud 3 times. Focus on sentence rhythm.
speaking_task.instructions: Focus on the rhythm of 'Je me présente' and the liaison in 'mon_ami'.
focus_points: Sentence rhythm: Je me présente → zhuh-muh-pray-zoh't

speaking_task.description: Read the dialogue aloud 3 times. Focus on time expressions and numbers.
speaking_task.instructions: Practice saying time expressions like 'midi' and 'dix'. Focus on the rhythm of 'rendez-vous'.

speaking_task.description: Read the dialogue aloud 3 times. Focus on directions and command intonation.
speaking_task.instructions: Focus on directional vocabulary and the polite command intonation of 'Attendez'.

speaking_task.description: Shadow the audio. Listen, pause, and repeat each sentence.
speaking_task.instructions: Listen to the audio, pause after each sentence, and repeat immediately. Focus on matching the speaker's rhythm and the formal register.

speaking_task.description: Shadow the audio. Listen, pause, and repeat.
speaking_task.instructions: Shadow the revision dialogue. Pay attention to the liaisons and maintain a smooth rhythm.

speaking_task.description: Shadow the audio. Listen, pause, and repeat.
speaking_task.instructions: Focus on the rising intonation of questions and the pronunciation of 'aujourd'hui'.

speaking_task.description: Shadow the audio. Listen, pause, and repeat.
speaking_task.instructions: Focus on family vocabulary and the liaison in 'huit_ans'.

speaking_task.description: Shadow the audio. Listen, pause, and repeat.
speaking_task.instructions: Focus on exclamations like 'Zut !' and the pronunciation of 'portefeuille'.

speaking_task.description: Read the dialogue aloud but change the items and quantities.
speaking_task.instructions: Change 'deux cafés' to 'trois cafés'. Change 'croissant' to 'pain au chocolat'. Read the new version aloud. Change at least 3 items.

speaking_task.description: Read the dialogue aloud but change the prices and fruits.
speaking_task.instructions: Change 'quinze euros' to 'douze euros'. Change 'fraises' to 'cerises'. Read the new version.

speaking_task.description: Read the dialogue aloud but change the gift and the action.
speaking_task.instructions: Change 'téléphone' to 'ordinateur'. Change 'envoyer des messages' to 'regarder des vidéos'.

speaking_task.description: Read the revision dialogue but change the names and places.
speaking_task.instructions: Change the names of the characters and the city they are in. Read the new version.

speaking_task.description: Read the dialogue aloud but change the monuments.
speaking_task.instructions: Change 'Le Louvre' to 'Le Musée d'Orsay'. Change 'la Tour Eiffel' to 'le Sacré-Cœur'.

speaking_task.description: Say 2 sentences in your own words describing what the guide is showing.
speaking_task.instructions: Example: 'Le guide montre des monuments. Il parle du Louvre.' Say it in your own way.

speaking_task.description: Say 2 sentences in your own words about the dialogue.
speaking_task.instructions: Example: 'Ils parlent de leurs projets. Ils veulent voir une exposition.'

speaking_task.description: Say 2 sentences in your own words about the dialogue.
speaking_task.instructions: Example: 'Ils veulent un rendez-vous. Le banquier est très occupé.'

title: Un bel endroit pour une fête

speaking_task.description: Say 2 sentences in your own words about the dialogue.
speaking_task.instructions: Example: 'Elle veut louer une salle pour une fête. C'est pour trente personnes.'

speaking_task.description: Say 2 sentences in your own words about the ambassadors' answers.
speaking_task.instructions: Example: 'Les ambassadeurs veulent la paix et le bonheur. L'ambassadeur français veut du chocolat.'

speaking_task.description: Say 2 sentences in your own words about the revision dialogue.
speaking_task.instructions: Example: 'Ils parlent de l'heure. Une personne n'a pas de montre.'

speaking_task.description: Say 2 sentences in your own words about the dialogue.
speaking_task.instructions: Example: 'Ils parlent des jeux de hasard. L'homme aime les courses de chevaux.'

speaking_task.description: Say 2 sentences in your own words about the dialogue.
speaking_task.instructions: Example: 'Il joue toujours les mêmes numéros. Il veut gagner beaucoup d'argent.'

title: Je ne vais pas bien du tout

speaking_task.description: Say 2 sentences in your own words about the dialogue.
speaking_task.instructions: Example: 'Elle est malade. Elle a mal à la tête et de la fièvre.'

speaking_task.description: Say 2 sentences in your own words about the dialogue.
speaking_task.instructions: Example: 'Ils ont faim. Ils décident d'aller à une crêperie.'

speaking_task.description: Summarize the dialogue in 3 complete sentences.
speaking_task.instructions: Who is speaking? Where are they? What are they ordering?

speaking_task.instructions: What are they looking for? What do they find? What is their final decision?

speaking_task.instructions: Who is speaking? What happened to them? How do they feel?

speaking_task.instructions: Who are the characters? What are they doing? What are they looking for?

speaking_task.description: Role-play a customer at a travel agency.
speaking_task.prompt: You are a customer at a travel agency. Ask for information about holidays, prices, and dates. The travel agent responds.
speaking_task.instructions: Practice asking questions. Use 'Je voudrais...', 'Est-ce que je peux avoir...', 'Combien coûte...'. Record your side of the conversation.

title: Cent pour cent des gagnants ont tenté leur chance !

speaking_task.description: Summarize the dialogue, then answer 3 questions aloud.
questions: Qu'est-ce que la personne pense des sports d'hiver ?
Qu'est-ce que vous feriez si vous gagniez un prix ?
speaking_task.instructions: Summarize the dialogue (2 mins), then answer the 3 questions aloud.

speaking_task.description: Role-play a student debating a politician.
speaking_task.prompt: You are a student named Noura, demanding environmental action.
speaking_task.instructions: Practice responding to the politician. Use 'Il faut que nous...', 'Je n'aimerais pas que...', 'Nous croyons que...'. Record yourself.

speaking_task.description: Summarize the dialogue, then answer 3 questions aloud.
questions: Qu'est-ce que la personne a fait avant de partir ?
speaking_task.instructions: Summarize the dialogue (2 mins), then answer the 3 questions aloud.

speaking_task.description: Role-play a conversation between a grandparent and grandchild.
speaking_task.prompt: You are the grandparent. Your grandchild has come to visit. Ask them about their life and relationships.
speaking_task.instructions: Practice asking about relationships. Use informal language. Record yourself.

speaking_task.description: Speak for 3-4 minutes about a time you were sick or felt terrible.
speaking_task.topic: A time you were very sick or felt terrible.
speaking_task.instructions: Think about a time you were sick. Describe what happened, how you felt, and what you did. Use idioms: 'malade comme un chien', 'avoir le cafard'.

speaking_task.description: Speak for 4-5 minutes about your journey learning French.
speaking_task.topic: Your journey learning French so far.
speaking_task.instructions: Speak about what you knew before (imparfait), what you have learned (passé composé), and your future goals (future).

speaking_task.description: Summarize the text, then answer 3 questions aloud.
questions: Quand la Tour Eiffel a-t-elle été construite ?
speaking_task.instructions: Summarize the text (2 mins), then answer the 3 questions aloud.

speaking_task.description: Role-play planning a farewell party.
speaking_task.prompt: You are organizing a farewell party. Discuss the arrangements.
speaking_task.instructions: Practice the conversation. Use 'Il est préférable de...', 'Nous allons...', 'Ça se fait de...'. Record yourself.

speaking_task.description: Speak for 3-4 minutes about a frustrating experience.
speaking_task.topic: A frustrating experience you have had.
speaking_task.instructions: Describe what happened, why it was frustrating, and how you felt. Use 'j'en ai plein le dos', 'quelle galère'.

speaking_task.description: Role-play a conversation with a shop assistant during the sales.
speaking_task.prompt: You are shopping during the sales. You want to buy a coat.
speaking_task.instructions: Practice the conversation. Use 'Je cherche un...', 'Est-ce que vous avez...', 'Je le/la prends.'. Record yourself.

speaking_task.description: Summarize the interview, then answer 3 questions aloud.
questions: Pourquoi Alain a-t-il reçu un prix ?
Qu'est-ce qu'il a fait avant de devenir chanteur ?
speaking_task.instructions: Summarize the interview (2 mins), then answer the 3 questions aloud.

speaking_task.description: Role-play a contestant on a radio quiz show.
speaking_task.prompt: You are a contestant answering quiz questions.
speaking_task.instructions: Practice responding to quiz questions. Use 'Je pense que...', 'Je ne sais pas.', 'Est-ce que c'est...?'. Record yourself.

speaking_task.description: Speak for 4-5 minutes about a time you faced difficulties and overcame them.
speaking_task.topic: A time you faced difficulties and overcame them.
speaking_task.instructions: Speak about the situation (imparfait), what happened (passé composé), how you overcame it, and what you learned.

speaking_task.description: Summarize the dialogue, then answer 3 questions aloud.
questions: Pourquoi les enfants ne viennent-ils pas ?
speaking_task.instructions: Summarize the dialogue (2 mins), then answer the 3 questions aloud.

title: Il faut que je trouve une bonne excuse...

speaking_task.description: Role-play refusing a request politely.
speaking_task.prompt: A friend asked for a favor, but you cannot do it. Refuse politely.
speaking_task.instructions: Practice refusing politely. Use 'Il faut que je...', 'Je préfère que vous...', 'Vous pourriez...'. Record yourself.

title: Notre action ne dépend que de vous

speaking_task.description: Speak for 4-5 minutes about a social issue you care about.
speaking_task.topic: A social issue you care about.
speaking_task.instructions: Speak about why it matters and what should change. Use 'il faut que', 'nous exigeons que'.

speaking_task.description: Role-play a meeting of employers.
speaking_task.prompt: You are representing employers. Present their position on the labor dispute.
speaking_task.instructions: Use 'Bien que nous...', 'Pourvu que nous soyons...', 'Il est peu probable que...'. Record yourself.

speaking_task.description: Summarize the dialogue, then answer 3 questions aloud.
questions: Quelle est la réaction de l'homme ?
Avez-vous déjà participé à un sondage ?
speaking_task.instructions: Summarize the dialogue (2 mins), then answer the 3 questions aloud.

speaking_task.description: Role-play a radio quiz show host.
speaking_task.prompt: You are hosting a radio quiz show.
speaking_task.instructions: Present the game, ask questions, and keep the energy up. Use 'Bonjour et bienvenue...', 'Quel aliment...', 'Bravo !'. Record yourself.

speaking_task.description: Speak for 4-5 minutes about a time you had to deal with bureaucracy.
speaking_task.topic: A time you had to deal with bureaucracy or red tape.
speaking_task.instructions: Describe what you needed to do, the obstacles, and how you resolved it.

title: Comment ça, je massacre le français ?

speaking_task.description: Role-play correcting someone's language.
speaking_task.prompt: You are a French teacher correcting a student.
speaking_task.instructions: Practice correcting politely. Use 'On ne dit pas...', 'Il faut dire...', 'C'est plus élégant de dire...'. Record yourself.

title: Un entretien avec un chasseur de têtes

speaking_task.description: Role-play a job interview.
speaking_task.prompt: You are being interviewed for a management position.
speaking_task.instructions: Answer interview questions. Use 'Je suis responsable de...', 'Mes compétences sont...', 'Je pourrais...'. Record yourself.

speaking_task.description: Summarize the dialogue, then answer 3 questions aloud.
speaking_task.instructions: Summarize the dialogue (2 mins), then answer the 3 questions aloud.

speaking_task.description: Role-play a detective questioning a witness.
speaking_task.prompt: You are a detective. Question a witness about the crime.
speaking_task.instructions: Use 'Qui que ce soit...', 'Où qu'il soit...', 'Quoi qu'il fasse...'. Record yourself.

speaking_task.description: Speak for 4-5 minutes about a disastrous experience.
speaking_task.instructions: Describe what happened, how it went wrong, and the consequences. Use 'se faire aider', 'faire une croix'.

speaking_task.description: Summarize the dialogue, then answer 3 questions aloud.
questions: Quel est le problème avec les noms en français ?
Connaissez-vous d'autres noms avec deux genres ?
speaking_task.instructions: Summarize the dialogue (2 mins), then answer the 3 questions aloud.

speaking_task.description: Speak for 4-5 minutes about your dream job or career goals.
speaking_task.topic: Your dream job or career goals.
speaking_task.instructions: Speak about what you do now or want to do, why you chose this path, your skills, and your future goals.

speaking_task.description: Summarize the interview, then answer 3 questions aloud.
questions: Que dit l'auteur à son sujet ?
speaking_task.instructions: Summarize the interview (2 mins), then answer the 3 questions aloud.

speaking_task.description: Summarize the historical account, then answer 3 questions aloud.
questions: Pourquoi les Parisiens ont-ils attaqué la Bastille ?
Que signifie cette date pour les Français ?
speaking_task.instructions: Summarize the events (2 mins), then answer the 3 questions aloud.

title: Les inconvénients du travail à domicile

speaking_task.description: Speak for 4-5 minutes about the pros and cons of remote work.
speaking_task.topic: The pros and cons of remote work.
speaking_task.instructions: Speak about the advantages and disadvantages. Use 'j'aurais dû', 'j'aurais pu'.

speaking_task.description: Role-play a TV news anchor.
speaking_task.prompt: You are a TV news anchor. Present the top stories of the day.
speaking_task.instructions: Use 'Bonsoir et bienvenue...', 'Un cambriolage a eu lieu...', 'Selon les autorités...'. Record yourself.

speaking_task.description: Role-play a debate participant.
speaking_task.prompt: You are debating whether humor should be unlimited.
speaking_task.instructions: Argue for or against. Use 'Je suis d'accord avec...', 'Au contraire...', 'Il faut se méfier de...'. Record yourself.

speaking_task.description: Speak for 4-5 minutes about a project you worked on.
speaking_task.topic: A project you worked on (successful or not).
speaking_task.instructions: Describe the project, challenges, and outcome. Use 'brûler les étapes', 'jeter l'éponge'.

speaking_task.description: Speak for 4-5 minutes about a famous person you admire.
speaking_task.topic: A famous person or historical figure you admire.
speaking_task.instructions: Speak about who they are, what they did, why you admire them, and their impact.

speaking_task.description: Role-play sharing exciting news.
speaking_task.prompt: You have exciting news to share with a friend.
speaking_task.instructions: Use 'J'ai une nouvelle incroyable...', 'Quand j'aurai fini...', 'Tu ne devineras jamais...'. Record yourself.

speaking_task.description: FINAL SPEAKING TASK. Speak for 5-6 minutes about your journey learning French.
speaking_task.instructions: Speak about why you started, your challenges, your achievements, your future plans, and how you feel about the Francophonie. Record yourself. Celebrate!
